title: React
description: A JavaScript library for building user interfaces. Used extensively to create dynamic functional components and manage application state.

title: Tailwind CSS
description: A utility-first CSS framework packed with classes that can be composed to build any design, directly in your markup.

title: Vite
description: Next generation frontend tooling. It provides a fast development server and optimized production builds.

title: Framer Motion
description: A production-ready motion library for React that makes it easy to add beautiful animations to your components.
